description: Independent content creator. Tips and donations welcome via hosted checkout or crypto.

intents.name: tip_hosted_checkout
intents.description: Send a tip via a hosted payment page (e.g., fiat gateway or crypto processor). Creates a one-time checkout session. Returns a payment URL the user visits to complete payment. Minimum $5.

message.description: Optional message to include with the tip

url.description: Checkout URL for the user to complete payment

intents.name: tip_crypto
intents.description: Send a tip directly to the creator's wallet via USDC transfer. The destination address is the payout_address in this manifest. No API call needed — read the address and initiate a direct transfer.

intents.name: get_content
intents.description: Browse the creator's published content. Returns a list of posts with titles, dates, and preview text.

returns.description: List of content items with title, date, category, and preview
